calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Rauch appeared for and with Hong Pham & Kia Tran.

Mr. Rauch stated that the couple was married in a rural area of Viet Nam in 1975 and that the custom at the time was that couples did not obtain marriage licenses. The Court granted the petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
